ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "created_utc" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the article based on user interactions */,
  "upvote_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of upvotes to total votes */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source where the article was published */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is published */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was published */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time" REAL /* Estimated reading time in minutes */,
  "image_count" INTEGER /* Number of images in the article */,
  "video_count" INTEGER /* Number of videos in the article */,
  "edit_history" TEXT /* JSON array of edit history (timestamp, user, changes) */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is pinned on the homepage */,
  "is_sponsored" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is sponsored content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the author joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* JSON array of specializations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the source logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the source is trusted */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the source was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the interaction is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., upvote, comment, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction (e.g., comment text) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the interaction */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the interaction was performed by a bot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction that created the comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "upvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvote_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is flagged for moderation */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES user_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user follows */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the share is related to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the article was shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was shared */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the article */,
  "share_text" TEXT /* Text of the share (if any) */,
  "share_link" TEXT /* URL of the shared article */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the share is organic or paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., keyword, topic, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of the keyword (e.g., main, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the metric is related to */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views the article has received */,
  "total_upvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of upvotes the article has received */,
  "total_downvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of downvotes the article has received */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments the article has received */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares the article has received */,
  "average_engagement_time" REAL /* Average engagement time in seconds */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "return_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of return visitors */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the article */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate (e.g., number of users who took a desired action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_metrics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the user is interested in */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag the user is interested in */,
  "preference_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's interest level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES article_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the version is related to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the article in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the current version */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved this version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
